login.title: Open the line.
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the factory dashboard.
login.heroSubtitle: Track bags, parties, and dispatch in real time. Speak orders in Hinglish — we handle the rest.

dashboard.title: Factory Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: What's pending, what's moving — at a glance.
dashboard.overdueSub: Pending orders older than {{days}} days — ranked oldest first.
dashboard.overdueEmpty: No overdue customers. The line is clean!

newOrder.title: Create Order
newOrder.customerPlaceholder: Type name to search or add new…
newOrder.noMatchAdmin: No matches. Click 'New' to add as a new customer.
newOrder.noMatchUser: No matches. Ask admin to add this customer.
newOrder.voiceIdle: Hold the mic and say items + quantity
newOrder.qtyLockedByBags: Quantity is auto-calculated from Bags. Clear Bags to edit Qty manually.
newOrder.choiceNone: Keep separate — create new order alongside
newOrder.choiceMerge: Add items to the latest pending order
newOrder.choiceClear: Mark previous pending as Cleared, save this as new
newOrder.newCustomerSub: This customer will be saved for future orders.

errors.selectCustomer: Please select or add a customer
errors.pickItem: Please pick a specific item SKU for every row
errors.noItemsParsed: Couldn't extract items — please add manually

success.voicePartial: Added {{count}} item(s); pick specific SKU for {{needs}} row(s)
success.voiceCustomerMismatch: Voice mentioned "{{name}}" — keeping your picked party

customers.title: Party Directory
customers.subtitle: Memory of variant preferences — auto-filled on next order.
customers.editDetailsSub: Admin-only: rename party, update phone or address.
customers.confirmDelete: Delete customer "{{name}}"? Blocked if any order references this party.
customers.addSub: Admin only — new parties for orders
customers.editSub: System will auto-suggest these next time you order for this party.

dispatch.title: Dispatch & Fulfill
dispatch.subtitle: Match stock against orders or directly dispatch from any pending order.
dispatch.noItemsYet: No items yet. Click "Add Item" below.
dispatch.stockTip: Tip: You can also dispatch items not in this stock list straight from the suggestions — we'll auto-add them as manual entries.
dispatch.emptyPrompt: Add stock on the left and click Suggest Matches.
dispatch.packingPlan: Packing Plan (one product type per bag)
dispatch.noOrdersMatch: No orders can be matched with current stock.
dispatch.directHeading: Pick any pending order & ship — no stock list needed

errors.addAtLeastOneItem: Add at least one item with quantity
errors.qtyGtZero: Set a quantity > 0 for at least one item
errors.qtyGtZeroDirect: Enter a quantity > 0 for at least one item
errors.exceedsStock: Dispatching {{qty}} of {{name}} — exceeds stock ({{available}}); will be adjusted
errors.noMatches: No pending orders match this stock

offOrder.hint: Use this when a party has no pending order — dispatch any SKUs directly. The record will appear in the Daily Dispatch Report automatically.
offOrder.partyPlaceholder: Search by name, city or transport…
offOrder.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Sample batch / cash sale / urgent…

errors.itemRequired: Add at least one item with quantity > 0

products.title: Product Master
products.subtitle: Edit max pieces per bag, or expand a category to override pcs/bag per SKU. Item-level overrides win over the category default during dispatch.
products.noSkus: No SKUs mapped to this category.
products.resetConfirm: Reset "{{name}}" to use category default bag size?
products.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This is blocked if any items or orders reference it.
products.editSub: Edit category max-per-bag and variants. Saves immediately.
products.variantsPlaceholder: e.g. Type A, Type B, Type C

errors.validMax: Enter a valid max per bag (> 0)

products.addSkuSub: Create a new item SKU. Bag size defaults to the category if left blank.
products.renameSkuSub: Edit the SKU name. Order history continues to reference this SKU by ID.
products.deleteSkuConfirm: Delete SKU "{{name}}"? Blocked if any order references it.

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.subtitle: Add users, delete accounts, and reset passwords. Admins have full authority across the system.
adminUsers.confirmDelete: Delete user "{{email}}"? This cannot be undone.

errors.allFields: Fill in name, email and password
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.selfDelete: You cannot delete your own account

orderEdit.title: Edit Order #{{id}}
orderEdit.sub: Admin-only full edit — change customer, items, dates, status and notes.

errors.noItems: Order must have at least one item
errors.pickItem: Pick a specific SKU for each row
errors.invalidQty: Enter a valid quantity for each row

settings.title: Overdue Threshold
settings.subtitle: Set the number of days after which Pending orders are flagged as overdue.
settings.overdueSub: Pending orders older than this many days will be flagged in red.
settings.overdueHint: Applies only to Pending orders. Dispatched / Cleared orders are never flagged.

errors.invalidDays: Enter a whole number between 1 and 365

attestation.title: Security Verification
attestation.subtitle: Required by factory policy
attestation.notice: For security and audit purposes, this factory records your location and a photo at every login. Click Allow to grant the standard browser permissions, or Skip to continue without verifying.
attestation.noticeEnforced: You are signing in from a mobile device. Factory policy requires a photo and your location at every mobile login. Click Allow and grant the browser permissions to continue — without this you will be signed out.
attestation.bulletAdminOnly: Visible only to admins in the Login Audit log
attestation.capturing: Verifying… please respond to the browser prompts.
attestation.errPhoto: Camera access was denied or no camera is available.
attestation.errLocation: Location access was denied or unavailable.
attestation.howToFix: Open browser settings for this site, enable Camera + Location, then tap 'Try again'.
attestation.signedOut: Sign-in cancelled — verification is required on mobile.

loginAudit.title: Login Audit
loginAudit.subtitle: Photo + location captured at login (consent-based). Admin-only.

customerBulk.confirmBulkDelete: Delete {{n}} customer(s)? Any party referenced by an order will block the entire delete.
customerBulk.importSub: Upload an .xlsx file with columns: name, phone, address, city, location, transport_name, price_list. Header row required. Import stops on any duplicate name or phone.

ledger.title: Single Party Ledger
ledger.subtitle: Party-wise running ledger of every dispatch — like a party account book.
ledger.partyApplyPrompt: Set a period, choose a party, then click View Ledger.
ledger.confirmDeleteBody: Do you want to delete this entry? Please confirm Yes or No.
ledger.editSaleSubtitle: Update GR number, transport, notes or bill amount for this sale.
ledger.taxesNote: Inclusive in net rate · GST nil for unregistered
ledger.paymentEmpty: No payments recorded for this party yet.
ledger.debitTooltip: Sales / dispatches made to this party — increases their balance owed.
ledger.creditTooltip: Payments received from this party — reduces their balance owed.
ledger.ledgerLegend: How to read this: every dispatch is a Debit (Dr) on this party's account; every payment received from them is a Credit (Cr). Running balance = total debit − total credit.
ledger.noTransactionsYet: No transactions yet for this party.
ledger.filterPickParty: Select a party to view its ledger
ledger.empty: No dispatches found for this range.
ledger.emptyParty: No dispatch has been made to this party.
ledger.pickPartyPrompt: Pick a party above to see their full dispatch ledger.
